# Pinned dependencies for the Bedtime Story Generator.
# Module 1 swaps the LLM provider: drops httpx (only used by the V1 Ollama
# call + the V1 healthz Ollama probe) and adds google-genai (Google's
# actively-maintained Gemini SDK; the older google-generativeai package
# is deprecated as of late 2025).
# Discipline: every `pip install <pkg>` must be preceded by adding the
# pinned line here, then `pip install -r requirements.txt`.

fastapi==0.115.*
uvicorn[standard]==0.32.*
jinja2==3.1.*
psycopg[binary]==3.2.*
python-dotenv==1.0.*
google-genai>=1.0.0
